findings.issue: TDD anchor still references the 't.Skipf as in existing stat-tests' pattern. Verified against internal/stat/stat_test.go: existing TestCollector_Update (:27) and TestCollector_collectDiskstats (:71) do NOT skip without a cluster - they assert.NoError on postgres.NewTestConnect() (connect-or-fail). No t.Skip exists under internal/stat/*_test.go. The task text now hedges this ('t.Skipf they do NOT use; if a skip-guard is needed use the project-accepted one'), but the residual 'as in existing stat-tests' phrasing is still slightly misleading. Non-blocking.
findings.fix: Optional: drop the lingering 'as in existing stat-tests' wording and state the real convention is connect-or-fail, or have TestCollector_Update_Verbose explicitly t.Skip on NewTestConnect error and note the divergence.
